import io
import string

fn find_index(_ s: String, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = ""
  mut idx = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(byte)
      if byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 13
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            if v == target
              return Some(idx)
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          idx = idx + 1
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(byte)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target
        return Some(idx)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  None
end

fn run(_ line: String, _ target_line: String) -> Unit
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(target_line))
  when Some(target)
    match find_index(string.trim(line), target)
    when Some(idx)
      println("index=#{idx}")
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(target_line)
    run(line, target_line)
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
when None
  println("not_found")
end
